Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 2, 030 [SB Gilgameš 02][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
Column i
(start of column missing)
o i 1'o 1'

[x] x x [...]

o i 2'2'

[x] IGI x [...]

o i 3'3'

NA? AN ZI? x [...]

o i 4'4'

am-mi-ni KI ⸢nam⸣-[maš-še-e ...]

(Šamhat said to Enkidu:) 'Why with the animals [...]?'

o i 5'5'

mit-lu-ku ra-ma-ni-⸢šu⸣ x [...]

Taking his own counsel ... [...],

o i 6'6'

ina ṭe₃-mi-šu-ma x [...]

on his initiative ... [...].

o i 7'7'

mu-du-u₂ lib₃-ba-šu-ma [...]

His very wise heart [...],

o i 8'8'

ša₂ fšam-ḫat [...]

of Šamhat [...].

o i 9'9'

1en lu-bu-šu₂ ⸢ra⸣-[man-ša₂ ...]

The first garment [...] herself,

o i 10'10'

u₃ ša₂-na-a lu-bu-šu₂ ša₂-⸢a⸣-[šu₂ ...]

and the second garment [...] him.

o i 11'11'

ṣab-ta-as-su-ma ki-ma DINGIR-MEŠ [...]

She was holding him, [...] like a god,

o i 12'12'

a-na gu-up-ri ša₂ lu₂SIPA [...]

to the shepherd's camp, [...].

o i 13'13'

lu₂SIPAu₂-tu₂ pu-uḫ-ḫu-rat ⸢e⸣-[li-šu₂]

The group of shepherds was gathered around him,

o i 14'14'

ina ṭe₃-mi-šu-nu-ma ina ra-ma-ni-⸢šu₂⸣-[ma]

on their initiative, by himself:

o i 15'15'

GURUŠ ana d<GIŠ>-gim₂-maš ki-i ma-šil la-[a-nu]

'How the young man is equal to Gilgameš in stature,

o i 16'16'

la-a-nu ši-i-ḫi na-bur-riš ⸢šar⸣-[ḫu?]

'he is tall in stature, he is splendid like battlements.

o i 17'17'

min₃-de-e-ma a-lid ina ša₂-⸢di⸣-[i]

'Certainly he was born in the mountains,

o i 18'18'

ki-ma ki-ṣir ša₂ da-nu dun-nu-nu e-mu-[qa-šu₂]

'his strength is mighty like a lump of Anu.'

o i 19'19'

a-ka-lu iš-ku-nu ma-ḫar-[šu₂]

They put bread in front of him,

o i 20'20'

ši-ka-ri iš-ku-nu ma-⸢ḫar⸣-[šu₂]

they put beer in front of him.

o i 21'21'

ul i-kul a-kal den-ki-du₃ ip-te-gi i-dag-[gal]

Enkidu did not eat the bread, he narrowed his eyes as he looked:

(2 columns missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (2 columns missing)
Column iii
r iii 1r iii 1

[aš₂-bu]-u₂-ma uš-ta-nam-da-nu a-na [...]

They were sitting down conferring, to [...]:

r iii 22

ḫa-aṣ-ṣi-nu ni-ip-ti-qu [...]

'Let us cast axes [...],

r iii 33

pa-a-šu₂ 7 GUN-AM₃ x [...]

'hatchets of 7 talents each ... [...].

r iii 44

nam-ṣa-ri-šu₂-nu 7 GUN-AM₃ : I ḫi-⸢pi₂⸣[...]

'Their swords of 7 talents each : ... (gloss: break) [...].

r iii 55

me-sir₂-ra-šu₂-nu 1 GUN-AM₃ : me-sir₂-ra ša₂ [...]

'Their belts of 1 talent each : the belt of [...]'

r iii 66

ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂KUM NI ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂[...]

(gloss: new break) ... (gloss: new break) [...]

r iii 77

ši-ma-ʾi-in-nu GURUŠ-MEŠ 5 MU-MEŠ GU₄.[U₄-MEŠ]

(Gilgameš said:) 'Listen to me, O young men, (gloss: 5 lines are skipped)

r iii 88

GURUŠ-MEŠ ša₂ UNUGki mu-du-⸢u₂⸣-[tu₂? ...]

'O young men of Uruk, knowing [...]!

r iii 99

ag-da-pu-uš al-lak ur-ḫu ⸢ru⸣-[qa-tu₂ ...]

'I have become bold enough to go on the distant path [...].

r iii 1010

MURU₂ ša₂ la i-du-u₂ a-maḫ-ḫar : ḫar-⸢ra⸣-[na ...]

'I shall face a battle that I do not know : a road [...].

r iii 1111

kur-ba-a-a-in-ni-ma lul-lik ana-ku : pa-ni-⸢ku⸣-[nu ...]

'Bless me so that I may go : your faces [...],

r iii 1212

lu-ru-ba-am-ma KA₂.GAL UNUGki ⸢ina⸣ [...]

'so that I may enter the city gate of Uruk in [...]!

r iii 1313

lu-us-saḫ-ra-am-ma a₂-ki-it ina MU.⸢AN⸣.[NA ...]

'Let me come back and [...] the akītu-festival [...] in the year,

r iii 1414

lu-pu-uš a₂-ki-it ina MU.[AN.NA x x]

'let me perform the akītu-festival [...] in the year.

r iii 1515

a₂-ki-it liš-ša₂-kin-ma ni-⸢gu⸣-[tu ...]

'Let the akītu-festival be held and [...] joyful music,

r iii 1616

a-lu-u₂ liš-taṣ-ṣa-nu ina [...]

'let the alû-drums resound in [...].'

r iii 1717

den-ki-du₃ ana ši-bu-u₂-tu₂ mil-[ka ...]

Enkidu [...] advice to the elders,

r iii 1818

ana GURUŠ-MEŠ ša₂ UNUGki mu-du-[u₂-tu₂? x x]

to the young men of Uruk, knowing [...]:

r iii 1919

qi₂-ba-niš-šim-ma la il-lak ana giš⸢TIR⸣ [x x]

'Tell him1 that he must not go to the forest [...],

r iii 2020

KASKAL-MIN ši-i ul ša₂ a-la-ku : a-me-lu šu-[u₂ x x]

'that road is not for travelling : That man [...],

r iii 2121

na-ṣir ša₂ giš⸢TIR gišEREN⸣ x [...]

'the guardian of the forest of cedar, ... [...].'

r iii 2222

x x x x [...]

(rest of column missing)

1 tablet : 'her'.
